column1: # WGBAST M74 yolk-sac-fry mortality (YSFM) series per river per year.
# v0.41.0 Arc 0 data-quality pass (2026-04-21): values cross-referenced
# against Vuorinen et al. 2021 Bothnian Bay (BB) pooled ranges extracted
# via scite. Per-year per-river tabulated values live ONLY in Vuorinen
# 2021 Supplemental Table S2 — not indexable via scite or the ICES MCP.
# The values below match the Vuorinen BB pooled ranges at multi-year
# granularity:
#   1992-1993: >0.75 (100%-mortality-subset covers 75% of females)
#   2002-2004: ~0 (negligible)
#   2005-2009: 0.09-0.23 (Kemijoki ~10pp higher than Simo/Torne)
#   2011-2014: 0.00 (no observed mortalities)
#   2015-2017: "worsened" (qualitative only)
# This CSV uses mid-range estimates within each Vuorinen pooled window
# with divergence between Simojoki and Tornionjoki capped at 10 pp
# (matching the paper's "max 25 pp
# Replace with Supplemental Table S2 values when available.
# Source template:
#   Vuorinen
#   estimating thiamine-deficiency-related mortality of Atlantic salmon
#   offspring and variation in the Baltic salmon M74 syndrome.
#   Marine and Freshwater Behaviour and Physiology 54(3)
# WGBAST (ICES 2025). Baltic Salmon and Trout Assessment Working Group.
# Values below reflect known outbreak years (1990s peak
# with moderate background levels in between. These are ORDER-OF-MAGNITUDE
# placeholders pending the exact Vuorinen 2021 supplementary-data series.
# Columns: year
